original_final_question: Find the Missouri state agency with 3rd average spending from 2007-10. Identify the city where its Southwest district is based. What highway was born in that city? Return the highway name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text:
1. Which Missouri state agency had the 3rd highest average expenditure from FY2007-FY2010? (Filter for this node: Fiscal Year == 2007; group by Agency Name; sum Payments Total; rank by total; keep top 5.)
2. Which Missouri state agency had the 3rd highest average expenditure from FY2007-FY2010? (Filter for this node: Fiscal Year == 2008; group by Agency Name; sum Payments Total; rank by total; keep top 5.)
3. Which Missouri state agency had the 3rd highest average expenditure from FY2007-FY2010? (Filter for this node: Fiscal Year == 2009; group by Agency Name; sum Payments Total; rank by total; keep top 5.)
4. Which Missouri state agency had the 3rd highest average expenditure from FY2007-FY2010? (Filter for this node: Fiscal Year == 2010; group by Agency Name; sum Payments Total; rank by total; keep top 5.)
5. In which city is the Southwest district of the agency (from hop 1: TRANSPORTATION/MoDOT) based?
6. What highway was born in the city identified in the previous step?
original_reasoning_chain: HOP 1 (d=4, Missouri State Expenditures FY2007-FY2010 - nodes 1-4):
Node 1: FY2007 expenditures -> Top 5 includes TRANSPORTATION
Node 2: FY2008 expenditures -> Top 5 includes TRANSPORTATION
Node 3: FY2009 expenditures -> Top 5 includes TRANSPORTATION
Node 4: FY2010 expenditures -> Top 5 includes TRANSPORTATION
Aggregation: TRANSPORTATION is 3rd highest by average expenditure
Node 5: MoDOT Southwest district is based in Springfield
Node 6: Springfield is the birthplace of Route 66
